props.name: service
props.type: export interface LocationService { partial: (query: Record<string, any>, replace?: boolean) => void; push: (location: H.Path | H.LocationDescriptor<any>) => void; replace: (location: H.Path | H.LocationDescriptor<any>) => void; reload: () => void; getLocation: () => H.Location; getHistory: () => H.History; getSearch: () => URLSearchParams; getSearchObject: () => UrlQueryMap; getLocationObservable: () => Observable<H.Location>; /** * This is from the old LocationSrv interface * @deprecated use partial, push or replace instead */ update: (update: LocationUpdate) => void; }
